company.name: Lycored
company.description: Lycored is an international ingredient company and the global leader in naturally derived carotenoids, producing natural food colorants, taste and texture enhancers, proprietary nutrient complexes, carotenoids, vitamins, and specialty ingredients for food, beverage, and dietary supplement markets. Founded in Israel in 1995, the company operates a vertically integrated model from tomato farming through extraction, microencapsulation, and formulation, offering over 100 products to more than 75 countries.

locations.description: Main production and office site in Israel; primary headquarters of Lycored. POB 320, Hebron Road, Industrial Zone, Be'er Sheva 8410202, Israel.
US production and sales office at 33 Industrial Parkway, Branchburg, NJ 08876.
European sales office at Rheinweg 4, 8200 Schaffhausen, Switzerland.

leadership.name: Yelena Shilaev
leadership.title: SVP, Global Quality, Safety and Customer Centricity

leadership.name: Eric Dereudre
leadership.title: Chairman, Lycored; Chief Commercial Officer, ADAMA

partnerships.name: Algatechnologies Ltd.
partnerships.description: Lycored partners with Algatechnologies Ltd. to source natural algae-derived astaxanthin from Haematococcus pluvialis that meets Lycored's quality and traceability standards.

colours.name: Red
colours.description: Lycored's red portfolio is sourced from lycopene derived from its own proprietary tomato breeds. It covers a wide hue range from deep crimson to pink and is positioned as the most stable and versatile natural red in the market, replacing synthetic Red 3 and Red 40. Multiple sub-families address different applications and processing demands.
sources: Lycopene from Lycored's proprietary tomato breeds (Lycopersicon esculentum)
key_properties: pH stable across full pH scale
Clean label: declared as 'lycopene' or 'lycopene from red tomatoes'
Whole Foods compliant options available (ResilientRed BF)
Vertically integrated supply from own tomato farms
challenges: Requires precise formulation to match authentic red shades
High-fat matrix applications require specific grades (e.g., ResoluteRuby)

colours.name: Orange
colours.description: Orange colors are derived from natural beta-carotene from Blakeslea trispora fungus. OrangeOvation covers orange to deep orange shades and is synergistic with Vitamin C. Suitable for a wide range of food and beverage applications including surimi, gummies, plant-based deli slices, and beverages.
challenges: Beta-carotene sensitivity to oxidation requires encapsulation
Maintaining orange shade consistency in emulsified products

colours.name: Yellow
colours.description: Yellow shades from Lycored are beta-carotene derived from Blakeslea trispora, covering golden to bright yellow hues. GoldHold and StellarYellow serve different hue ranges and application needs, and both offer global acceptance as alternatives to synthetic Yellow 5 and Yellow 6.
key_properties: Global acceptance (alternative to Tartrazine Yellow 5 and Sunset Yellow 6)
Available in powder or liquid format (GoldHold)
Can be labeled as an active ingredient
challenges: Achieving true bright yellow without the 'neon' effect associated with synthetic alternatives

colours.name: Pink
colours.description: Pink shades fall within the lycopene-based red family at lower dosages or higher hue values, providing summer fruit-inspired pink tones. Particularly relevant for ResilientRed at higher hue values (33-37) and lower dosages of red families in fruit preparations, beverages, and surimi.
sources: Lycopene from Lycored's proprietary tomato breeds
challenges: Differentiating pink from red shades requires precise dosage control
Migration control in layered dairy and fruit prep products

products.name: ResoluteRuby™
products.description: Tomato lycopene-derived natural colorant providing deep authentic red shades (hue value 18-24). Star performer for plant-based meats and UHT dairy. Palm-free and clean label.
features: Derived from lycopene from Lycored's own tomatoes
benefits: Authentic red for plant-based meat raw and cooked appearance
Superior shelf life vs. artificial Red 3 in UHT applications
Clean label declaration as 'lycopene from red tomatoes'
Consumer-preferred over artificial colors in moms' surveys

products.name: ConstantCrimson™
products.description: Lycopene-based natural colorant with deep red shades (hue value 9-22). Available in grades A and B. Standout performer in UHT dairy, surimi, and plant-based meats.
features: Derived from lycopene from Lycored tomatoes
benefits: 30+ days shelf life extension in surimi vs. carmine
96% consumer preference in UHT strawberry milk surveys
No visible color difference at 90 days in plant-based deli slices
Consumer-friendly labeling

products.name: ResilientRed™
products.description: Lycopene-derived colorant providing pink to red shades (hue value 24-37). Most versatile in the red family. Available in grades A and C.
features: Sourced from lycopene from Lycored tomatoes
benefits: Superior stability vs. black carrot across pH scale
No color migration into yogurt layer over 31-day shelf life
Stable in beverages up to 12 months
Ideal for fortified and functional beverages

products.name: ResilientRed BF™
products.description: Whole Foods compliant variant of ResilientRed. Free from sugar esters and palm oil. Designed for premium market positioning.
features: Free from sugar esters and palm oil
Derived from lycopene from Lycored tomatoes
benefits: Access to premium retail markets
Consumer-preferred nature-based color in UHT applications
Clean label health halo for brands
88% of health-conscious moms willing to pay more for naturally derived colors

products.name: OrangeOvation™
products.description: Beta-carotene derived natural colorant from Blakeslea trispora providing orange shades (hue value 29-68). Available in grades A, B and Clear.
features: Derived from beta-carotene from Blakeslea trispora
benefits: Delta E 2.10 after 3 months in plant-based deli slices (no visible difference)
30+ days shelf life extension in surimi chiller cabinet
Supports health perception for citrus flavors
Global regulatory harmonization

products.name: GoldHold™
products.description: Natural beta-carotene colorant from Blakeslea trispora in fine free-flowing powder format (hue value 66-70). Provides yellow to orange shades. Alternative to Tartrazine Yellow 5 and Sunset Yellow 6.
features: Available as powder (A Dry) or liquid
Derived from beta-carotene from Blakeslea trispora
benefits: Can be labeled as an active
Global regulatory harmonization
Versatile delivery as powder or liquid
Replaces synthetic beta-carotene, Tartrazine (Yellow 5), Sunset Yellow (Yellow 6)

products.name: StellarYellow™
products.description: Natural beta-carotene colorant from Blakeslea trispora providing bright yellow shades (hue value 75-84). Available in grades A and C Clear. Alternative to Yellow 5 and Yellow 6.
features: Derived from beta-carotene from Blakeslea trispora
benefits: True-to-fruit shades for lemon, pineapple, apricot, peach, mango
Stable across 12-month shelf life in beverages
Suitable for clear and cloudy formulations
Global acceptance unlike some other yellow alternatives

products.name: SANTE
products.description: Proprietary, patent-protected natural taste enhancer derived from ripe non-GMO tomatoes. Rich in naturally occurring umami and kokumi characteristics. Available as liquid and powder.
features: Derived from ripe, select non-GMO tomatoes
Available in liquid (SANTE MS LIQUID) and powder (SANTE MS POWDER) formats
Kosher, Halal, allergen-free, Non-GMO, vegan, clean label
benefits: 30% sodium reduction in pizza sauce and crust
40% salt and cheese reduction in plant-based meatballs
Enables complete added sugar removal in sauces
Alternative to MSG, artificial flavoring agents
Versatile for sweet and savory applications

products.name: CTC (Clear Tomato Concentrate)
products.description: Patent-protected 100% natural tomato serum concentrate with high BRIX and acidity acting as a taste improver. Synergistic with SANTE for salt and sugar reduction.
features: Kosher, Halal, allergen-free, Non-GMO, vegan, clean label
benefits: Provides tomato taste addback and BRIX character
When paired with SANTE: 30% salt reduction and complete added sugar removal in pizza sauce
Aids in tomato paste extension amid rising paste prices
Labeled as natural tomato flavor in some regions

products.name: LycoFibers
products.description: Additive-free natural tomato fibers produced as a byproduct of Lycored's holistic production process. Used to enhance texture, provide viscosity, and extend tomato paste supply.
features: Kosher, Halal, allergen-free, Non-GMO Project Verified, vegan, clean label
Labeled as 'tomato fibers' in some regions
benefits: Extends tomato paste supply by up to 25%
Reduces carbohydrates by reducing tomato paste
Offers smooth texture and glossy sheen to sauces
Alternative to emulsifiers in most applications

products.name: Lycomato6™
products.description: Flagship branded whole-tomato health extract and the most studied lycopene-based product in the world. Contains 6 standardized phytonutrients including lycopene, beta-carotene, phytoene, phytofluene, tocopherols, and phytosterols. Available in oleoresin and beadlet formats.
features: Standardized to 5-15% natural tomato lycopene depending on grade
Contains full spectrum of 6 phytonutrients plus vitamins A, E and phytosterols
Vertically integrated, non-GMO, traceable tomato breed
GRAS for food and beverage use
Available as oleoresin (softgels) and starch beadlets (VAS format for gummies, tablets, dry beverages, capsules)
benefits: Supports immunity, skin health, heart health, eye health, men's and women's health
Highly bioavailable; builds 'reservoir of carotenoids'
Supports mitophagy and mitochondrial function
Linked to telomere length maintenance
Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties
Clinically backed across multiple health areas

products.name: Lumenato™
products.description: Proprietary skin structure nutrient extracted from a specially bred golden tomato using CO2, solvent-free extraction. Contains phytoene and phytofluene (no lycopene). Vegan collagen booster. Recently approved as novel food in the EU.
features: Standardized from proprietary golden tomato variety
Contains phytoene and phytofluene; no lycopene
Available as oleoresin, starch beadlets, and 4% emulsion
Non-GMO Project Verified, allergen-free, Kosher, Halal, plant-based
benefits: Strengthens skin barrier (59.9% more stripping required to disrupt barrier in clinical study)
Vegan collagen booster
Supports ceramide production and skin structure
Clinically shown to improve skin firmness and reduce transepidermal water loss
Approved as EU novel food (2025)

products.name: Lycoderm™
products.description: Mediterranean diet-inspired proprietary blend of tomato extract and rosemary leaf extract (carnosic acid). Award-winning photoaging defender clinically proven for skin photoprotection and UV damage management.
features: Blend of standardized tomato extract and rosemary leaf extract
Available as suspension for softgels and liquid-filled capsules
benefits: Clinically proven reduction in UV-induced erythema (145-subject placebo-controlled study)
Reduces severity of wrinkles and fine lines
Improves skin dryness, tone, and youthful appearance
Complements topical sunscreen
Award-winning: 2017 NutraIngredients Awards Best University Research

products.name: Cardiomato™
products.description: Proprietary cardiovascular wellness blend combining patented standardized tomato extract and phytosterol complex. Proven safe and effective in six clinical trials. Won 2016 NutraIngredients Best Finished Product of the Year (Heart Health).
features: Combination of carotenoid-rich tomato extract and proprietary phytosterol blend
Proven safe and effective in 6 clinical trials
benefits: Reduces LDL oxidation after high-fat meals
Maintains blood pressure within normal range
Improves endothelial function (RH-PAT index)
Supports healthy circulatory system
Clean label solution

products.name: VAS™ (Versatile Application Solutions)
products.description: Microencapsulated starch beadlet delivery system engineered as a universal formulation solution. Available with lycopene, beta-carotene, lutein, and Vitamin D. Launched November 2025 at SupplySide Global.
features: Dense layered microstructure for tablet compressibility
benefits: Single format for tablets, gummies, capsules, powder beverages
Streamlines product development
Eliminates need for multiple ingredient sources
Exceptional stability, versatility and performance across formats

products.name: Capsudar™
products.description: Lycored's proprietary precision microencapsulation technology for vitamins and specialty ingredients. Uses spray coating, fluidized bed, spray drying, and trituration to stabilize delicate actives.
features: Spray coating and fluidized bed microencapsulation
Masks taste and color of nutrients
Slow release option (up to 12 hours for caffeine)
benefits: Extends shelf life and protects ingredients through processing
Reduces production overage and cost
Improves dispersibility
Suitable for gummies, bars, tablets, capsules, beverages
applications: Vitamins A, B, C, D, E, K

products.name: HueFinder™
products.description: Lycored's proprietary online color matching platform for food and beverage formulators to explore and identify natural color options across its full portfolio by category and shade.
features: Covers full range of red, orange, yellow shades
benefits: Simplifies natural color selection
Reduces formulation time
Enables rapid shade identification for beverages, confectionery, dairy, plant-based and more

products.name: Lycopene (Carotenoid Ingredient)
products.description: Lycored's flagship carotenoid ingredient extracted from its own vertically integrated tomato breed. The most studied carotenoid in the world with over 300 published clinical trials. Available in multiple beadlet formats including VAS and VBAF.
features: Extracted from proprietary non-GMO tomato breed
Available as starch beadlets (VAS), alginate beadlets (VBAF), and S beadlets
benefits: Supports skin health, immunity, heart health, eye health, bone health, prostate health, male fertility
Over 300 published clinical trials
Synergistic with other carotenoids

products.name: Lutein
products.description: Lutein sourced from marigold petals (Tagetes erecta). Available in multiple formats including VAS beadlets, VBAF alginate beadlets, and oil suspensions. Includes Lutein-HZ with optimized lutein:zeaxanthin 5:1 ratio.
features: Multiple formats: VAS starch beadlets, alginate beadlets, oil suspensions
Patented synergies with Lycomato for eye health
benefits: Reduces AMD progression risk by up to 25% (AREDS2)
Improves MPOD and contrast sensitivity
Supports blue light filtering (especially Lutein-HZ)
Supports cognitive function, skin health, and immunity

products.name: Beta-Carotene (Carotenoid Ingredient)
products.description: Naturally sourced beta-carotene from Blakeslea trispora fungus. Converts to Vitamin A in the body. Available in starch beadlets, alginate beadlets, and oil suspensions. Also offered as BetaCote (nature identical).
features: Sourced from patented Blakeslea trispora strain
Natural provitamin A activity; highest per gram of common sources
Multiple formats: VAS starch beadlets, alginate beadlets, oil suspensions
benefits: Supports immunity, cognitive health, skin health, eye health, cardiovascular health
Clean-label natural alternative to synthetic beta-carotene
Price-stable; not affected by weather or seasonality
Used both as nutrient and colorant

products.name: Astaxanthin
products.description: Natural astaxanthin derived from Haematococcus pluvialis algae. Only form with clinical backing. Available in beadlets and oleoresin formats.
features: Available as S beadlets (2.5%), VBAF (2-2.5%), and oleoresin (5-10%)
ISO, HACCP, GMP, Non-GMO, Kosher, Halal certified
benefits: Offsets exercise-induced immune decreases (8mg/day, 4 weeks - Frontiers in Nutrition RCT)
Supports immunity, skin health, and collagen protection
Supports healthy aging and antioxidant activity

products.name: Vitamins and Specialties (Capsudar Range)
products.description: Broad range of microencapsulated vitamins (A, B, C, D, E, K), minerals, and amino acids using Capsudar precision encapsulation technology. Portfolio includes L-Carnitine, Methionine, Caffeine, and Potassium Iodide.
features: Multiple formats: spray coating, spray drying, fluidized bed, trituration
Non-GMO, Kosher, Halal, allergen-free across most products
benefits: Protects sensitive vitamins through processing and storage
Meets out-of-pack label claims
Reduces overage
Suitable for tablets, gummies, bars, beverages, capsules

industries.name: Beverage
industries.description: Lycored provides naturally derived lycopene and beta-carotene colorants for a wide range of beverage types with proven 12-month shelf life stability, pH independence, and synergy with Vitamin C. Also supports beverage fortification with carotenoids and vitamins.
consumer_trends: Demand for natural and clean-label colors replacing synthetic Red 3, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6
Instagram generation visual appeal driving color innovation
Growth in immunity-boosting and functional beverages
Consumer shift away from neon/artificial appearance
Sparkling water, mocktail, and low-alcohol beverage growth
needs: pH stability across acidic to neutral range
Stability with ascorbic acid (not degradation like anthocyanins)
12-month shelf life stability
Resistance to fading, ringing, and sedimentation
Clean label declaration
Global regulatory acceptance
solutions: ResilientRed A for strawberry/fruit beverages
ConstantCrimson A for watermelon (with homogenization)
OrangeOvation B/C Clear for citrus and energy drinks
StellarYellow A/C Clear for lemon, pineapple, orange shades
GoldHold A Dry for powder mixes
HueFinder™ for shade selection

industries.name: Plant-based Meat
industries.description: Lycored is a leading supplier of natural colorants for plant-based meat alternatives, offering lycopene and beta-carotene colors that replicate authentic meat hues across raw, cooked, and processed formats.
consumer_trends: Flexitarian, vegan, and vegetarian growth driving plant-based alternatives
Demand for authentic meat-like appearance and color
Preference for clean-label, vegan, non-GMO ingredients
Scrutiny of carmine and iron oxide in plant-based products
needs: Authentic hue range from yellow to orange, red, and pink
Stability under high shear, smoking, steaming
Heat, light, and pH stability
Long shelf life in refrigerated and frozen formats
Vegan, Kosher, Halal certification
Clean label declaration
solutions: ResoluteRuby for bleeding/browning effect in burgers
ConstantCrimson for deli slices and sausages
ResilientRed BF for UHT plant-based and premium markets
OrangeOvation for plant-based deli and fish alternatives
StellarYellow for poultry and egg substitutes
SANTE and CTC for salt and taste enhancement in plant-based formulations

industries.name: Dairy
industries.description: Lycored provides heat-stable, naturally derived lycopene colorants for UHT dairy and flavored milk drinks, replacing artificial Red 3. Also offers nutrients and vitamins for fortified dairy products.

UHT manufacturers seeking clean-label alternatives to Red 3

88% of health-conscious moms prefer naturally derived colors

Longer shelf life than artificial alternatives
Consumer-preferred appearance
Clean label declaration
Kosher and Halal certification
solutions: ResoluteRuby A for strawberry UHT dairy
ConstantCrimson A for strawberry milk
ResilientRed BF for premium UHT positioning
Carotenoids and vitamins for dairy fortification

industries.name: Surimi and Seafood
industries.description: Lycored offers premium lycopene and beta-carotene colorants for surimi seafood that extend shelf life by 60+ days vs. carmine or paprika, while achieving minimal color migration and consistent vibrant hues.
consumer_trends: Consumer preference for vibrant surimi coatings as freshness signals
Premium positioning through superior color stability
Demand for Kosher and Halal certified seafood products
Shift away from carmine, paprika, titanium dioxide
needs: Vibrant red and orange outer coatings
Minimal color migration into white mass
Shelf life extension in chiller cabinet
Non-animal derived colorant (vegan)
Kosher and Halal compliance
Chemical-free color management
solutions: OrangeOvation A for orange surimi coatings
ResilientRed A/BF for red surimi coatings
ConstantCrimson A for deep red surimi coatings
ResilientRed BF for premium/Whole Foods positioning

industries.name: Confectionery
industries.description: Lycored provides naturally derived, stable colors compatible with gummy, hard candy, and pan-coated confectionery manufacturing, including Vitamin C compatibility and resistance to multiple heat/drying stages.
consumer_trends: Parental demand for natural colors in children's confectionery
Growth of gummies as supplement delivery format
Clean label confectionery gaining share
Regulatory bans on synthetic dyes driving reformulation (Red 3, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6)
needs: Stability through gummy processing including Vitamin C co-fortification
Authentic fruit shades (strawberry, watermelon, lemon, pineapple, peach, orange)
Compatible with sugar-free recipes
Stability through multiple heat and drying stages in hard candy
Vegan, Kosher, Halal compliance
solutions: ResilientRed A (strawberry, watermelon) for gummies
OrangeOvation C Clear for orange gummies
StellarYellow C Clear for lemon/clear gummies
StellarYellow A for pineapple/yellow gummies
ResilientRed C for pan-coated hard candy
OrangeOvation D for pan-coated orange candy

industries.name: Supplements and Nutrition
industries.description: Lycored is a comprehensive supplier of carotenoids, proprietary nutrient complexes, and microencapsulated vitamins for dietary supplement manufacturers. Its VAS and VBAF platforms simplify formulation across tablets, capsules, gummies, and powders.
consumer_trends: Growing health-awareness driving supplement uptake
Preference for plant-based, non-GMO supplement ingredients
Demand for scientifically validated and clinically tested ingredients
Gummies as preferred supplement format
Beauty-from-within and longevity supplement growth
Sports nutrition and recovery supplement growth
needs: Bioavailability and stability of sensitive actives
Single format compatible with multiple product types
Clean label, non-GMO, allergen-free positioning
Clinically backed efficacy claims
solutions: Lycomato6 for whole-body wellness supplements
Lumenato for beauty-from-within gummies and capsules
Lycoderm for photoprotection supplements
Cardiomato for cardiovascular health supplements
Lycopene VAS for simplified multi-format formulation
Lutein HZ for eye health supplements
VAS platform for streamlined supplement manufacturing

industries.name: Food and Savory
industries.description: Lycored offers tomato-derived taste enhancers and texture solutions for food applications including pizza, sauces, soups, and plant-based foods. Focus on salt reduction, taste enhancement, and natural clean label positioning.
consumer_trends: Demand for reduced-sodium and reduced-sugar food products
Growth of plant-based food alternatives
Clean label and natural ingredient preferences
Premium positioning through better-for-you formulations
needs: Salt and sugar reduction without flavor compromise
Natural umami and kokumi taste enhancement
Tomato paste extension amid price increases
Texture enhancement from natural sources
solutions: SANTE for 30-65% sodium reduction in pizza and savory applications
CTC for natural tomato taste addback
LycoFibers for 25% tomato paste extension and texture
Lycopene-based colors for pizza sauce shelf life stability

innovations.name: VAS™ (Versatile Application Solutions) Technology
innovations.description: Microencapsulated starch beadlet system engineered as a single universal formulation solution for multiple delivery formats. Launched November 2025 at SupplySide Global. Available for lycopene, beta-carotene, lutein, and Vitamin D.
features: Dense layered microstructure for tablet compressibility
Narrow particle size distribution for capsule flowability
One product format for tablets, capsules, gummies, and beverages
benefits: Streamlines product development
Eliminates need for multiple ingredient sources
Exceptional stability and versatility
Reduces formulation complexity and cost
related_products: VAS Portfolio (Lycopene VAS, Lutein VAS, Beta-Carotene VAS, Vitamin D VAS)

innovations.name: Color Emulsion Range (StellarYellow A, StellarYellow C Clear, OrangeOvation C Clear)
innovations.description: Three new superstable, nature-based color emulsions debuted at IFT FIRST 2025 to celebrate Lycored's 30-year anniversary. Designed for beverages, gummies, supplements, and UHT applications. Positioned as replacements for Yellow 5 and Yellow 6.
features: Clear and extended shelf life performance
Compatible with wide range of applications
benefits: Nature-based replacement for synthetic Yellow 5 and Yellow 6
Long shelf life across beverages, gummies, and supplements
Crystal-clear performance in clear beverages

innovations.name: Lumenato™ EU Novel Food Approval
innovations.description: Lumenato and Lycoderm received European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) novel food approval in December 2025, enabling sale within the European Union and expanding access to the European beauty-from-within market.
features: Golden tomato-derived phytoene and phytofluene extract
Clinically backed skin structure and barrier support
benefits: First-to-market advantage in EU for golden tomato skincare extracts
Opens new global market for beauty-from-within innovation
Supports brands in EU clean-label ingestible skincare positioning

innovations.name: Lycomato6™ Skin Health Clinical Study (2023)
innovations.description: Clinical trial on 50 healthy women across diverse ages, ethnicities, and skin types showing measurable skin improvements after 4 weeks and 12 weeks of daily Lycomato supplementation at 15mg lycopene. Published in Journal of Cosmetic Dermatology.
features: Multi-ethnic and multi-age study design (35-58 years, Fitzpatrick II-V)
Expert visual grading, instrumental measurement, and consumer perception
benefits: 86% reported improved overall skin appearance at 12 weeks
Significant improvement in fine lines, wrinkles, pore appearance, brightness, firmness
Skin barrier improvement at 12 weeks
Supports inclusive beauty positioning

innovations.name: Astaxanthin Sports Recovery Clinical Study (2023)
innovations.description: First-of-its-kind human clinical trial published in Frontiers in Nutrition demonstrating that 8mg/day astaxanthin for 4 weeks significantly offset exercise-induced decreases in 20 plasma immunoglobulins, including IgM, in runners.
features: Untargeted proteomics and targeted oxylipin/cytokine panel
benefits: Normalizes 20 immunoglobulins during recovery in runners
Supports immune balance during intense exercise
Provides a natural, plant-based solution for sports recovery

innovations.name: ResilientRed BF (Whole Foods Compliant Red)
innovations.description: Novel variant of ResilientRed that is free from sugar esters and palm oil, meeting Whole Foods Market quality standards. Enables entry into premium retail channels with a clean-label, nature-based red color.
features: Free from sugar esters and palm oil
Derived from lycopene from Lycored tomatoes
Stable through UHT, plant-based, and surimi applications
benefits: Access to premium retail segments
High consumer loyalty in premium channels
Differentiated positioning vs. standard natural colors

innovations.name: Holistic Production Process (Zero Waste Tomato)
innovations.description: Lycored's proprietary vertically integrated production model achieves 100% tomato utilization. Tomato skins, stems, and seeds are repurposed; liquid serum yields taste enhancers (SANTE, CTC); fiber pulp yields colors and lycopene; remaining pulp yields LycoFibers.
features: Vertically integrated from farm to finished ingredient
Farms in California, Israel, and other regions
Mechanical crushing, deaeration, cooling and heating for separation
benefits: Sustainability story for brand partners
Consistent supply chain and quality control
Red tomato variety 4x richer in lycopene than standard commercial tomatoes
Golden tomato variety specifically bred for phytoene/phytofluene content

innovations.name: Lutein-HZ (High Zeaxanthin) Formula
innovations.description: Optimized lutein blend with a 5:1 lutein to zeaxanthin ratio mimicking the natural distribution of carotenoids in the macula, clinically validated for superior blue light protection and digital eye strain reduction vs. standard lutein.
features: Clinically validated in screen users via RCTs
Greater MPOD improvement vs. standard lutein
benefits: Targeted protection for digital screen users
Improves MPOD, contrast sensitivity, glare tolerance, tear film stability
Especially effective for low baseline MPOD populations
Relevant for athletes and aging populations

sustainability.strategy: Lycored's sustainability approach is built around its 'Holistic Production' model that achieves 100% tomato utilization with zero waste, combined with ESG commitments covering environment, social responsibility, and governance. The company promotes renewable energy, recycling, waste reduction, ethical supply chains, and community engagement through annual Heart + Soil Day.
targets: Maintaining sustainable procurement standards across all supplier relationships
Continued expansion of nature-based ingredient portfolio to replace synthetic additives
initiatives: Heart + Soil Day - annual global community outreach program including farm volunteering (Israel), elderly home visits (Switzerland), marigold garden planting (USA), park improvements (France, NJ), Habitat for Humanity volunteering (NJ), and playground building (Ukraine)
Good in Bloom initiative - community nutrition education and nature engagement programs for children and communities worldwide
Live video streaming from Galilee Panhandle tomato farm in Israel, garnering over 1,000,000 views, promoting supply chain transparency
Carbon emission offset partnership for Good in Bloom flower delivery (ClimateCare mentioned)
Partnership with Tene Briut nonprofit for nutrition education for Ethiopian-Israeli communities
Marigold seed distribution activities at Santa Barbara installation to visualize carbon footprint reduction
ISO 14001 certified (Lycored LTD and Lycored Bio) for environmental management
ISO 45001 certified for occupational health and safety
SMETA social audit (Lycored LTD and Lycored Bio)
key_metrics: Tomato variety used in red products is 4x richer in lycopene than standard commercial tomatoes
LycoFibers enables up to 25% reduction in tomato paste usage
Tomato farm webcam attracted over 1,000,000 views promoting supply chain transparency
Over 75 countries served with nature-based ingredients
